name: hermes-agent.dnp.dappnode.eth
shortDescription: Self-improving AI agent with multi-LLM support and messaging gateway
description:
Hermes Agent is a self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research. It features a built-in learning loop — creating skills from experience, improving them during use, and building a deepening model of who you are across sessions.

- **Web Gateway**: Full-featured web interface for interacting with AI
- **Multi-LLM Support**: OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more
- **Messaging Gateway**: Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal — all from a single process
- **Skills System**: Agent-curated procedural memory that self-improves
- **Persistent Memory**: Cross-session recall with user modeling
- **Cron Scheduling**: Automated tasks with delivery to any platform
- **Subagent Delegation**: Spawn isolated subagents for parallel workstreams

Run your own AI agent with full control over your data and API keys.
author: DAppNode Association <admin@dappnode.io>

exposable.name: Hermes Agent API
exposable.description: OpenAI-compatible API for programmatic access to Hermes AI agent

exposable.name: Hermes Agent Setup Wizard
exposable.description: Web-based setup wizard for easy configuration

exposable.name: Hermes Web Terminal
exposable.description: Browser-based terminal for running hermes CLI commands

warnings.onRemove: Removing this package will delete all your Hermes Agent configuration, conversation history, skills, memories, and cached data. Make sure to create a backup first.
